ops.validate_desc: Runs SteamCMD validation to repair missing or corrupt files (slower updates).
ops.update_desc: Checks for updates when launching the app and before starting the server.

discord.mentions.title: Mentions
ini.edit.title: Edit Selected Line
ini.edit.help:
Edits are staged and auto-saved.
On Start: staging is copied into the server folder.
On Stop (Safe): baseline is restored into the server folder.
ini.add.title: Add / Append Line
console.title: Console
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ServerAdminPassw: Administrator password used for RCON and in‑game admin commands.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ServerPassword: Password required for players to join the server. Leave empty for public.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.RCONEnabled: Enable or disable the RCON remote console (True/False).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.RCONPort: TCP port used by RCON. Make sure it is open on the firewall.
ini.desc./Script/Engine.GameSession.MaxP: Maximum number of players that can join the server.
ini.desc./Script/Engine.GameSession.Sess: Public server name shown in server lists.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ServerPVE: Enable PvE mode. Players cannot damage each other or structures.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ServerPve: Enable PvE mode. Players cannot damage each other or structures.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ServerCrosshair: Enable or disable the on‑screen crosshair.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ShowMapPlayerLoc: Show player location marker on the map.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.EnablePvPGamma: Allow gamma command on PvP servers (True/False).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ServerAdminLoggi: Log admin commands to server logs (True/False).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowThirdPerson: Allow third‑person view on the server.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.TheMaxStructures: Cap on structures allowed within a radius (anti‑lag).
ini.desc./Script/ShooterGame.ShooterGame: Experience gain multiplier for players and dinos.
Taming speed multiplier (higher = faster taming).
Resources gained per hit multiplier (higher = more).
Resource node health multiplier (higher = more hits before it breaks).
Night cycle speed scale (higher = faster nights).
Day cycle speed scale (higher = faster days).
Wild dino population multiplier (higher = more wild dinos).
Legacy difficulty offset (use with OverrideOfficialDifficulty).
Overrides max wild dino level (e.g., 5.0 for 150).
Player food drain rate multiplier.
Player water drain rate multiplier.
Player stamina drain rate multiplier.
Player health regen multiplier.
Dino food drain rate multiplier.
Dino stamina drain rate multiplier.
Dino health regen multiplier.
No‑respawn radius for resources around players (in meters).
No‑respawn radius for resources around structures (in meters).
Structure decay period multiplier in PvE (higher = longer before decay).
Time between mating attempts (lower = more frequent).
Egg hatch speed multiplier.
Baby maturation speed multiplier.
Baby food consumption speed multiplier.
Quality bonus from imprinting scaling.
Time between cuddles for imprinting (lower = more frequent).
Grace period to perform a cuddle before losing imprinting quality.
Rate at which missed cuddles reduce imprinting quality.
Egg laying interval multiplier (lower = more eggs).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AdminLogging: When True, writes all admin commands to in‑game chat.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowAnyoneBabyI: Allow anyone to cuddle/imprint babies, not only the imprinter.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowCaveBuildin: Allow building in caves when the server is in PvE mode.
Allow building in caves when the server is in PvP mode.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowCrateSpawns: Allow air supply crates to land on top of structures.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowCryoFridgeO: Allow Cryofridge placement on platform saddles and rafts.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowFlyerCarryP: Allow flyers to pick up wild creatures in PvE.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowFlyingStami: Allow flyers to recover stamina while landed.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowHitMarkers: Enable hit markers for ranged attacks.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowIntegratedS: Enable built‑in S+ structures (set False to rely on the mod).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowMultipleAtt: Allow attaching more than one C4 to the same creature.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowRaidDinoFee: Allow Titanosaurs to be fed and kept permanently.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowTekSuitPowe: Enable TEK suit powers in Genesis: Part 1.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AlwaysAllowStruc: Disable the pickup timer so structures can always be picked up.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AlwaysNotifyPlay: Always show leave notifications in chat.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AutoDestroyOldSt: Enable and scale auto‑destroy of abandoned structures.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.BanListURL: Remote URL for a global ban list text file.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ClampItemSpoilin: Clamp any extended spoiling times back to default caps.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ClampItemStats: Enable item stat clamps (use ItemStatClamps in Game.ini).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ClampResourceHar: Limit harvest damage so high damage does not waste resources.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.DayCycleSpeedSca: Scale the overall day/night cycle length.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.DestroyUnconnect: Auto‑destroy unconnected water pipes after a delay.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.DinoDamageMultip: Damage dealt by wild creatures multiplier.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.DinoResistanceMu: Damage taken by wild creatures multiplier (lower = tankier).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.DisableCryopodEn: Allow cryopod use even when enemies are nearby.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.DisableCryopodFr: Allow cryopods without a powered Cryofridge nearby.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.DisableDinoDecay: Disable tame decay in PvE mode.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.DisableImprintDi: Disable imprinting stat bonus on tamed creatures.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.DisableStructure: Disable structure decay globally (works in PvP/PvE).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.EnableExtraStruc: Block building in resource‑rich prevention volumes.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.FastDecayUnsnapp: Enable fast decay for lone foundations/pillars/X plants.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.globalVoiceChat: Make in‑game voice chat global instead of proximity based.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.HarvestAmountMul: Resources gained per harvest action multiplier.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.HarvestHealthMul: Resource node health multiplier (more hits per node).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ItemStackSizeMul: Global item stack size multiplier (items with stack 1 excluded).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.KickIdlePlayersP: Seconds of inactivity before idle players are kicked (with -EnableIdlePlayerKick).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.OxygenSwimSpeedS: Swim speed gain per level invested into Oxygen.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.PlayerResistance: Damage taken by players multiplier (lower = tankier).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.PreventOfflinePv: Delay in seconds before ORP becomes active after logout.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ProximityChat: Restrict chat visibility to nearby players only.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ResourcesRespawn: Resource respawn rate multiplier (lower = faster respawn).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ServerForceNoHUD: Force hide HUD for non‑tribe NPCs.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ServerHardcore: Enable Hardcore mode (reset to level 1 on death).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ShowFloatingDama: Enable floating damage numbers on hit.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.StructureDamageM: Damage dealt by structures (e.g., spike walls) multiplier.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.StructurePickupH: Hold duration for quick structure pickup.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.StructurePickupT: Time window after placement to quick‑pickup structures.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.StructureResista: Damage taken by structures multiplier (lower = tankier).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.TamedDinoDamageM: Damage dealt by tamed creatures multiplier.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.TamedDinoResista: Damage taken by tamed creatures multiplier (lower = tankier).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ActiveMods: Comma‑separated Mod IDs to load, highest priority on the left.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ActiveMapMod: Mod ID for the currently active mod map.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ActiveTotalConve: Total conversion Mod ID (e.g., Primitive Plus).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AllowHideDamageS: If False, show damage sources in tribe logs.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ArmadoggoDeathCo: Seconds before Armadoggo can reappear after fatal damage.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.AutoDestroyDecay: Auto‑destroy decayed, claimable tames on load.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.bForceCanRideFli: Allow riding flyers on maps where flyers are disabled.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.CosmeticWhitelis: URL for whitelist of custom cosmetic mods (CSV).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.CosmoWeaponAmmoR: Ammo added per Cosmo webslinger reload tick.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.CustomDynamicCon: HTTP URL to dynamicconfig.ini for live changes.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.CustomLiveTuning: URL to live tuning JSON used by the server.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ExtinctionEventT: Seconds between automatic world wipes for ARKpocalypse.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ImplantSuicideCD: Cooldown in seconds for the implant Respawn feature.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxCosmoWeaponAm: Max ammo for Cosmo webslinger (‑1 = scales with level).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxGateFrameOnSa: Max gateways allowed on platform saddles (0 disables).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxHexagonsPerCh: Cap of Hexagons a character can hold.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxPlatformSaddl: Global limit of platform saddles/rafts across the ARK.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxTamedDinos: Global cap of tamed creatures on the server.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxTamedDinos_So: Soft tame limit threshold for auto‑marking tames 'for cryo'.
Seconds before auto‑deleting tames above the soft limit.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxTrainCars: Maximum number of cars a train can have.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxTributeCharac: Slots for uploaded characters in ARK Data.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxTributeDinos: Slots for uploaded creatures in ARK Data.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.MaxTributeItems: Slots for uploaded items in ARK Data.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.NonPermanentDise: Make permanent diseases clear on respawn.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.NPCNetworkStasis: Players count at which stasis range scaling begins.
Players count at which final stasis range scaling applies.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.OverrideOfficial: Override default difficulty (e.g., 5.0 for level 150 wilds).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.OverrideStructur: Allow turrets (and spikes) on platform saddles.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.PersonalTamedDin: Tame slots cost used by a structure‑mounted platform.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.PlatformSaddleBu: Expand build bounds on platform saddles.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.PvPDinoDecay: Enable tame decay while ORP is active on PvP servers.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.PvPStructureDeca: Enable structure decay while ORP is active on PvP servers.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.RaidDinoCharacte: Food drain multiplier for raid dinos (e.g., Titanosaur).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.RCONServerGameLo: Lines of game logs sent over RCON buffer.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.ServerAutoForceR: Seconds after restart to force wild respawn (0 disables).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.SpectatorPasswor: Password used to allow non‑admin spectators.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.TribeLogDestroye: Include enemy structure destruction in tribe logs.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.TribeNameChangeC: Minutes of cooldown between tribe name changes.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.UseOptimizedHarv: Enable harvesting optimization for high harvest rates.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.YoungIceFoxDeath: Seconds before Veilwyn can reappear after fatal damage.
ini.desc.SessionSettings.Port: UDP Game Port for the server (default 7777).
ini.desc.SessionSettings.SessionName: Public name shown in the server browser.
ini.desc.MessageOfTheDay.Duration: Seconds to display the MOTD on player login.
ini.desc.MessageOfTheDay.Message: Text of the message shown to players when joining.
ini.desc.Ragnarok.AllowMultipleTamedUnic: True allows one wild and unlimited tamed Unicorns.
ini.desc.Ragnarok.EnableVolcano: Enable or disable the volcano activity.
ini.desc.Ragnarok.UnicornSpawnInterval: Hours before a new wild Unicorn can spawn.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.CryopodNerfDamag: Percent of damage removed after cryopod deploy (0.1 = ‑90%).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.CryopodNerfDurat: Seconds that Cryosickness lasts after deployment.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.CryopodNerfIncom: Percent of extra damage taken after deployment.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.BadWordListURL: URL for bad words list (text filtering).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.BadWordWhiteList: URL for good words whitelist (text filtering).
ini.desc.ServerSettings.bFilterCharacter: Filter character names using word lists.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.bFilterChat: Filter chat messages using word lists.
ini.desc.ServerSettings.bFilterTribeName: Filter tribe names using word lists.
